allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d.get\('ok'\)\); data=d.get\('data',[]\); print\('type:', type\(data\).__name__\); print\('count:', len\(data\) if isinstance\(data, list\) else 'N/A'\); print\('first:', json.dumps\(data[0], ensure_ascii=False\) if isinstance\(data, list\) and data else data[:200] if isinstance\(data,str\) else data\)")
